markets.name: Vienna
markets.registration: Registration with the city required; Wohnzone restrictions apply
markets.cap: Max 90 nights/yr for non-primary residences in residential zones

markets.name: Salzburg
markets.registration: Permit required; new STRs heavily restricted in the city
markets.cap: Apartment STRs largely prohibited without dedicated permit

markets.name: Berlin
markets.registration: Registration number (Registriernummer) mandatory on listings; Zweckentfremdung permit for non-primary homes
markets.cap: Primary residence: unlimited with registration; secondary: max 90 days/yr with permit
markets.tax: City Tax 5% of net accommodation price

markets.name: Munich
markets.registration: Zweckentfremdung rules; permit needed beyond 8 weeks/yr letting
markets.cap: Max 8 weeks/yr without permit
markets.tax: No city tourist tax (Bavaria); VAT rules apply

markets.name: Barcelona
markets.registration: HUT licence required; NO new licences issued
markets.cap: City announced phase-out of all tourist flats by 2028
markets.tax: Regional tourist tax + city surcharge per night

markets.name: Madrid
markets.registration: VUT licence required; independent-entrance rule restricts most apartments in central zones
markets.cap: Zone-dependent; central district heavily restricted

markets.name: Lisbon
markets.registration: Alojamento Local (AL) registration; new registrations suspended in containment zones
markets.cap: Zone containment; existing ALs subject to periodic review
markets.tax: Municipal tourist tax per night (capped nights)

markets.name: Porto
markets.registration: AL registration required; containment zones in the historic centre
markets.cap: Zone-dependent

markets.name: Paris
markets.registration: Mandatory registration number on all listings; change-of-use rules for secondary residences
markets.cap: Primary residence max 120 nights/yr (90 from 2025 national law option)
markets.tax: Taxe de séjour per person per night

markets.name: Amsterdam
markets.registration: Registration number + permit (vakantieverhuur) required
markets.cap: Max 30 nights/yr, max 4 guests

markets.name: London
markets.registration: No registration yet; national scheme announced/in progress
markets.cap: Max 90 nights/yr short-term letting without planning permission

markets.name: Dublin
markets.registration: RTB/Fáilte Ireland STR register; planning permission needed in rent-pressure zones for non-primary
markets.cap: Primary residence: 90 days/yr while owner away

markets.name: Prague
markets.registration: Trade licence + guest reporting; new national registry legislation in progress
markets.cap: No hard cap (as seeded)

markets.name: Budapest
markets.registration: NTAK registration mandatory; District VI banned new STRs (referendum)
markets.cap: District-level powers; Terézváros ban from 2026

markets.name: Rome
markets.registration: CIN national code mandatory on listings; SCIA to the municipality
markets.cap: No hard cap; keybox ban and in-person check-in rules debated
markets.tax: Contributo di soggiorno per night by category

markets.name: Florence
markets.registration: CIN code required; new STRs banned in UNESCO historic centre
markets.cap: Historic-centre restriction

markets.name: Athens
markets.registration: AMA registration number; new registrations frozen in central districts (1st–3rd)
markets.cap: District freeze; national per-property limits

markets.name: New York City
markets.registration: Local Law 18: mandatory registration; host must be present; max 2 guests
markets.cap: Unhosted stays under 30 days effectively banned
markets.tax: Hotel taxes apply to legal stays

markets.name: Miami
markets.registration: City of Miami: zone-restricted; Miami Beach: heavily restricted with high fines
markets.cap: Zone-dependent; resort-tax registration required

markets.name: Austin
markets.registration: STR licence required; Type 2 (non-owner-occupied) rules revised repeatedly
markets.cap: Licence + occupancy limits
